items.summary: Over at Amazon, HOTO’s official storefront is now offering its PixelDrive electric screwdriver for $59.98 shipped. While it has climbed as high as $80 in recent months, it more regularly sells closer to $70. Today’s deal takes roughly $10 off its typical going rate and matches the lowest price we have tracked to date. It is not a huge discount, but this is still a great deal to cash in and grab one of the more capable options around for at-home repairs, furniture assembly, and lighter DIY projects. Head below for more details.

items.title: LEGO officially reveals first Pokémon sets with minifigs

items.title: Score Keychron aluminum and hot-swap keyboards for up to 64% off today at Woot with deals from just $40
items.summary: Woot is now offering a wide selection of Keychron keyboards at some of the lowest prices we’ve tracked, with discounts reaching up to 64% and prices starting from $39.99 Prime shipped (a $6 delivery fee will apply otherwise). You can even use promo code KEYCHRON during checkout to save an additional $10 off and unlock additional savings. The sale is focused largely on workstation-friendly models this time around, with a mix of wired and aluminum wireless options for office setups, productivity rigs, and everyday use. Unlike some of Woot’s other keyboard events, every model in this sale is brand-new and backed by a 1-year manufacturer warranty. Select models also give you the choice between tactile and linear switches, so be sure to check the listings for the configuration that best suits your setup.
